title: Mooblooms and Moolips!
description: Adds the Moobloom back to the game.
body:
# **Miss the Moobloom?**
No more! Since **I**, _Magnus25GD_, made a **Resource pack** for Players with _the game versions_ **1.21.5- and 1.21.5+**
![ze mooblooms~](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937398003dbd08927c14b72acb156d8305013cce.png)

# Features
This replaces the Mooshroom's texture to the Moobloom's texture from Minecraft Earth. This pack also changes the regular Mushroom Plant, and the Blocks.
![i am stoick plz helpo je suis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98939f693fca57cefe14ec8575dd754ebf292b7e.png)

# Notes:

**There will be another version for players that use 1.21.5-**
UK Version of English is only avaliable for 1.21.5+, some UK stuff might not be the same, since there is no en_gb.json file for me to edit. 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(The only stuff I know in UK English is Cookie being Biscuit, Cooked chicken being Roast chicken and armor being armour)

</details>
